name: Kira Graham
description:
Bear. Women. So, when I do a demihuman bot I like to research the courting behavior of that animal (my fbi agent either thinks I'm very weird or an aspiring zoologist) and I am surprisingly not traumatized by polar bears. They're weirdly cute 😭 Begging y'all to take care of her she needs it

Kira has been trying to court a potential mate (that's youuu) for a few days now. She's been doing her best. Bringing gifts, guarding their den, but not touching. That's a boundary she hasn't tried crossing. Until now.

TW/CW: LOSS OF A PARENT (Not death, she literally lost her)

Why are my lesbian/sapphic bots tagged as anypov?

I leave pronouns gender neutral and don't describe the user's gender because I want to include non-binary and trans lesbians. For that reason, I tag them as anypov so non-fem lesbians can find them. I cannot express how much it is not my problem if you choose to ignore the WLW and fempov tags.

Why are my pansexual/bisexual bots tagged as WLW?

Because the bot isn't straight and unfortunately there aren't tags for sexualities beyond WLW/MLM. This makes it easier for LGBTQ+ people to find bots that also cater to them.

Image generated with midjourney.
creator: VenaAmoria
